Article Title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader's Abby Summers reveals painful skin struggle after cosmetic procedure
Article Text:
Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader Abby Summers revealed she underwent microneedling treatment after dealing with ongoing skin issues, sharing the update from a cosmetic clinic on Instagram. Summers called dermatologist Acacia McDonell her “skin hero” and received praise from fans for being honest about her struggles. The post comes as attention around Summers continues growing following her public relationship debut with Philadelphia Eagles defensive back Cooper DeJean earlier this month.

Cooper DeJean’s girlfriend Abby Summers reveals cosmetic procedure for skin issues

Abby Summers and Cooper DeJean continue drawing NFL fan attention

Abby Summers gave fans a candid glimpse into her personal life this week after revealing she underwent a cosmetic skin procedure while dealing with frustrating skin issues. The Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader, who recently went public with Philadelphia Eagles star Cooper DeJean, shared the update directly from a dermatologist’s clinic on social media.The post quickly grabbed attention online, especially among NFL fans already curious about Summers after her growing public appearances alongside DeJean. Instead of glamorous red carpet photos, this time Summers chose honesty, showing followers a more vulnerable side of her everyday life.Summers shared an Instagram Story from Skin Pharm, where she underwent microneedling treatment. The procedure uses tiny sterilized needles to target skin concerns and improve texture. Alongside a photo from the clinic, she explained exactly why she decided to do it.“Microneedling! BC my skin has been going through it,” Summers wrote.In another story, she praised cosmetic dermatologist Acacia McDonell and called her “skin hero,” making it clear the treatment was part of her effort to regain confidence after dealing with difficult skin problems.The social media update sparked supportive reactions from followers who appreciated Summers being open about skincare struggles instead of presenting a perfect online image.Many fans praised her honesty, especially in a world where public figures often avoid discussing cosmetic treatments openly.Summers appeared relaxed during the visit, wearing a red sleeveless crop top paired with matching low rise sweatpants while posing inside the clinic.Interest surrounding Abby Summers has grown rapidly since her relationship with Cooper DeJean became public earlier this month at the Kentucky Derby. The couple made headlines after appearing together on the red carpet, instantly becoming one of the NFL offseason’s most talked about young pairings.Before the Derby appearance, Summers also posted a playful TikTok video featuring DeJean while the traditional Derby bugle played in the background. “Derby timeeee,” she captioned the clip.Beyond her relationship, Summers already had a growing fanbase thanks to her role with the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders. She joined the iconic squad in 2024 and later gained even more visibility after appearing in Netflix’s America’s Sweethearts: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders.Her football ties have also created entertaining rivalry moments. After the Cowboys defeated the Eagles during the 2025 season, Summers celebrated online with a pointed caption aimed at DeJean’s team: “Bye bye birds👋.”Now entering her second season as a Cowboys Cheerleader, Summers continues building her own spotlight while balancing life in the middle of the NFL world.
Article Summary: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader Abby Summers revealed she underwent microneedling treatment after dealing with ongoing skin issues. Summers called dermatologist Acacia McDonell her “skin hero” and received praise from fans for being honest about her struggles. The post comes as attention around Summers continues growing following her public relationship debut with Philadelphia Eagles defensive back Cooper DeJean.

Article Title: "They would upstage the entire thing": Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini drama takes shocking new turn after NFL schedule claims
Article Text:
Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini continue dominating NFL headlines as the offseason controversy refuses to fade. Jim Rome claimed the NFL may have used the drama to boost interest in New England’s Week 1 spotlight game, while Chase Daniel and Michael Irvin urged fans to stop obsessing over personal matters. Irvin strongly defended both figures, arguing that outsiders do not know the full story behind the growing media frenzy.

Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini drama sparks wild NFL schedule conspiracy

NFL figures defend Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini amid growing backlash

Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini have somehow become one of the NFL offseason’s biggest talking points without either of them directly fueling the fire. What started as online gossip has now turned into a nonstop media storm, dragging in former players, analysts, and even questions about the NFL schedule itself.The growing attention around the situation has reached a bizarre level. Every public comment now becomes headline material, and fans continue dissecting every reaction tied to the Patriots coach and the longtime NFL insider. Instead of fading away, the story keeps gaining momentum.The latest twist came from veteran analyst Jim Rome, who suggested the NFL may have leaned into the controversy while building the 2026 schedule. During his comments, Rome argued that New England’s high-profile Week 1 spotlight was less about football and more about public fascination surrounding Vrabel.“Has a Super Bowl rematch ever meant less?” Rome said. “This Super Bowl rematch has nothing to do with a Super Bowl rematch and everything to do with the public fascination with the Patriots’ head coach, his personal life, and where his career goes from here.That’s what that’s about.”Rome doubled down by claiming the league understood exactly what kind of attention the matchup would create.“That’s why they gave us that game. That’s why they knew they could upstage the entire schedule release with one simple post, with one simple graphic. They knew they would upstage the entire thing by giving us Vrabel as soon as they possibly could.”His comments instantly reignited debate online. Some fans agreed the NFL thrives on controversy and attention. Others felt the theory stretched reality too far. Still, the fact that the discussion even exists shows how massive the storyline has become during a relatively quiet offseason.Former NFL quarterback Chase Daniel also addressed the situation while appearing on The Jim Rome Show. Daniel, who previously worked with Russini on “Scoop City,” avoided diving too deep into the controversy.“Look, that’s something that’s unfortunate in many different ways,” Daniel said. “We haven’t really chatted about it. We haven’t done any of that, so I’m going to leave that there. That’s their business.”Hall of Famer Michael Irvin took an even stronger stance while speaking on the Ariel Helwani Show. He criticized people obsessing over the situation and pushed back against harsh online judgment.“Life happens. We’re trying to use people in football to be the measuring stick for all the righteousness,” Irvin said. “It’s a person, and people do things. Sometimes it’s not right, but we’re not in their homes. We don’t know what they’re dealing with.”For now, the Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini drama continues to dominate conversations across the NFL world, whether fans are exhausted by it or still completely hooked.
Article Summary: NFL figures defend Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini amid growing backlash. Jim Rome claimed the NFL may have used the drama to boost interest in New England’s Week 1 spotlight game. Chase Daniel and Michael Irvin urged fans to stop obsessing over personal matters.

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumor: Kansas City Chiefs could pursue veteran former $63M New England Patriots WR as Rashee Rice faces uncertainty
Article Text:
Kansas City Chiefs could pursue veteran former $63M New England Patriots WR as Rashee Rice faces uncertainty.(Image via X)

Kansas City Chiefs urged to make a move for former New England Patriots’ wide receiver Stefon Diggs

The Kansas City Chiefs have had a challenging time on the field in the last season after losing Super Bowl LX to the Philadelphia Eagles.As the team ended up missing the playoffs for the first time since 2014, it has sparked major concern. Amid this, the Kansas City Chiefs’ star wide receiver Rashee Rice is now serving jail time for 30 days and is all set to miss the minicamp. He also went through surgery recently and as per ESPN, Rashee Rice, he might be sidelined for two months. Now, popular former New England Patriots’ wide receiver has been linked to the team.A few hours ago, as per Sportsnaut’s recent report, popular wide receiver Stefon Diggs could find his place in the Kansas City Chiefs amid Rashee Rice’s mess.Sportsnaut noted in a recent report, “Stefon Diggs would be a much-needed presence for Patrick Mahomes next season. Diggs is looking for a new home after the Patriots released him due to financial reasons.”The report added, “The 32-year-old wide receiver is a reliable middle-of-the-field target that would thrive in the Chiefs’ offense. With Diggs looking to win a Super Bowl, this would be the perfect landing spot.”However, the Kansas City Chiefs are yet to respond to the speculations involving Stefon Diggs as he continues to remain an unrestricted free agent.The 32 year old wide receiver Stefon Diggs has proven his worth in the last season as he recorded 85 receptions for 1,013 yards and 4 touchdowns across 17 regular season games in the last season.Stefon Diggs also broke records as he became the first New England Patriots’ receiver since Julian Edelman in 2019 to record at least 1000 receiving yards in a single season.While Stefon Diggs has expressed his interest in joining the Washington Commanders, nothing has been confirmed yet.As for Rashee Rice, the Kansas City Chiefs has remained distant from the drama as he remains in Dallas jail until 16th June after he violated his probation and tested positive for THC.
Article Summary: Kansas City Chiefs urged to make a move for former New England Patriots’ wide receiver Stefon Diggs. The 32-year-old wide receiver is a reliable middle-of- the-field target that would thrive in the Chiefs’ offense. Rashee Rice remains in Dallas jail until 16th June after he violated his probation and tested positive for THC.

Article Title: A tale of two coaches: Mike Vrabel’s coping method with Jen Vrabel vs Sean McVay’s out loud support for Veronika McVay
Article Text:
(Image via X: Sean McVay, Veronika McVay, Mike Vrabel, and Jen Vrabel)

Sean McVay gushes over wife Veronika Khomyn while Mike Vrabel undergoes therapy with wife Jen Boleyn to fight Dianna Russini scandal

Veronika McVay saved husband Sean McVay from walking away from his NFL coaching career

Trying is one thing. But screaming praises is another.Los Angeles Rams head coach Sean McVay recently revealed how his wife, Veronika K. McVay [nee Khomyn], saved his NFL coaching career.Whereas New England Patriots head coach Mike Vrabel is buying sweatshirts for his wife, Jen Vrabel, and undergoing therapy to get over the scandalous Dianna Russini story.The Globe’s source said, “Mike [Vrabel] is fully committed to making sure his marriage weathers this [Dianna Russini] storm.He’s in therapy solo and with Jen [Vrabel], that’s a non-negotiable.This isn’t something you can solve overnight, but he’s throwing everything he can at this.”Dianna Russini and Mike Vrabel were allegedly photographed in the Sedona luxury hotel in March 2026. They were married at the time.Kevin Goldschmidt showed support for his wife, Dianna Russini, by landing a heartfelt kiss outside their New Jersey home on Mother’s Day.But Mike Vrabel? He has not gone public about his wife, Jen Vrabel.He was spotted at Salt Lake City International Airport, where he bought a light cobalt-blue sweatshirt, probably for his wife.Jen was photographed sporting her wedding ring after the scandal broke internet records. But have they both gone public about their marriage? No, not yet.On the other side of the coaching world, Los Angeles Rams’ head coach Sean McVay recently appeared on the Bussin’ With The Boys podcast.The youngest Super Bowl-winning coach shared that after he secured a 5-12 season record in 2022, a year after he had won a Super Bowl against the Cincinnati Bengals, he had hit rock bottom in his head coaching career.He was contemplating quitting. Massive broadcasting opportunities waited for him. But he just couldn’t the losing. “It was almost like a scarlet letter,” he said.A major decisive point came when his wife Veronika, told him something that made him think about why he started coaching in the first place:“You know, that never really sounded like the kind of leader you wanted to be.”McVay admitted that her line hit him like a ton of bricks! At that moment, he decided that he wanted more from his life.He wanted to set an example for his growing family that losing does not mean quitting.His wife Veronika was pregnant at the time with their first son, Jordan. They welcomed him in 2023. And a second son, Christian, was welcomed in 2025.In 2025, the Rams almost made it to Super Bowl LX. They reached the NFC Conference Championship game but lost it to the Seattle Seahawks.They were one step shy of the Super Bowl. Sean McVay is certain they will have it this year!If he had not listened to his wife, Veronika, he would not have been where he was in 2025… just one step shy of the Super Bowl.
Article Summary: Los Angeles Rams head coach Sean McVay recently revealed how his wife, Veronika Khomyn, saved his NFL coaching career. New England Patriots head coach Mike Vrabel is undergoing therapy with wife Jen Boleyn to fight the Dianna Russini scandal.

Article Title: Personal life private: Chargers QB Justin Herbert skips second practice amid Madison Beer’s steamy European Tour
Article Text:
(Image via X: Justin Herbert and Madison Beer)

Justin Herbert abruptly skipped second practice as girlfriend Madison Beer electrifies The Locket Tour

The Chargers star Justin Herbert has been a constant supporter of his superstar girlfriend Madison Beer

Attendance is not mandatory at this stage of the offseason program.But Justin Herbert ’s absence for the second time in a row does stand out.The Athletic’s Daniel Popper reports that Justin Herbert did not show up for the Phase 2 voluntary practice.The 28-year-old Los Angeles quarterback was not present for the second straight Chargers practice open to media; Monday last week, and now on May 19.While on Justin Herbert’s personal sphere--- where is vehemently adored just like Travis Kelce is for showing his wholehearted support throughout his fiancée Taylor Swift ’s Tours ---his girlfriend, Madison Beer, is currently in the middle of her European leg of her Locket Tour.The stops include Berlin on May 19, and Amsterdam on May 21, and Paris on May 22.A commenter forecasted, “I am guessing Herbert goes to the next two concerts in Amsterdam and Paris. Two great cities.And probably leaves his sweetie [Madison Beer] on the weekend, flies home from Paris and is back for the May 26-27 OTAs.”Is Justin Herbert worried the media probably would question more about his girlfriend Madison Beer’s tour and less about his recovering non-throwing hand?He is known to keep his personal life private. The media also focuses on his football career [on-field performance] and rehabilitation updates [recovery].But with the sheer coincidence of his voluntary practice and her concert tour… one has to wonder why this second absence? Especially when he is loudly supporting her for The Locket Tour…Even though Justin Herbert is not physically supporting Madison Beer, he keeps his support alive through comments…Madison Beer News shared a screenshot of his wholesome comment on Madison Beer’s Instagram post from her tour on X.He wrote, “She do be so cute when she performs.” If this is not love, then what is?A commenter wrote, “She is sad because he is not with her on tour anymore. Not because of comments on the internet.”Another said, “Bro doesn’t need to win a Super Bowl, he’s already won. Put a ring on that hand of hers, lock that down!”While fans are rooting for their relationship, his absences from spring sessions may not be under so much scrutiny.Or could it be? Is he not happy with former Miami Dolphins head coach Mike McDaniel’s addition as the new offensive coordinator for Los Angeles?There are certain new members in the offensive line as well… is this why he is missing practice?Anyhow, Chargers Wire’s Gavino Borquez reports that under the NFL ’s collective bargaining agreement, spring sessions are optional.This may not affect Justin Herbert’s regular-season performance.But wide receiver Ladd McConkey was also absent… if key players miss practice sessions, fans might begin to worry a little.
Article Summary: Justin Herbert was not present for the second straight Chargers practice open to media; Monday last week, and now on May 19. His girlfriend, Madison Beer, is currently in the middle of her European leg of her Locket Tour. Under the NFL ’s collective bargaining agreement, spring sessions are optional.
